RSID: # Study: North-to-South European SLE GWAS Meta-Analysis
# Discovery: Bentham 2015 (N=4,036 cases) + FinnGen R12 (N=1,306 cases)
# 1. Replicated Loci (26/45): Cross-referenced with Open Targets (v24.0),
#    - Anti-IFNAR1 (Anifrolumab): Targets downstream of IRF5/STAT4 pathway.
#    - JAK Inhibitors (Baricitinib, Tofacitinib): STAT4 / TYK2 pathway.
#    - TYK2 Inhibitor (Deucravacitinib): TYK2 locus directly identified.
#    - Calcineurin Inhibitors (Voclosporin): Approved for lupus nephritis.
# 3. Novel Targets: CD44, BANK1, CLEC16A, TYK2 represent potentially
#    actionable new entry points for drug development in SLE.
